free_text: Cadet reported being repeatedly mocked and excluded by a small group during recent parade nights. Appears upset but no physical harm disclosed.
Cadet disclosed feeling overwhelmed and not wanting to attend activities. Mentioned trouble sleeping and feeling better off not here but no specific plan.
Parent reports ongoing arguments at home affecting the cadet’s behaviour at cadets. No direct safeguarding disclosures but asks staff to keep an eye on them.
Cadet observed with bruises on arms and reluctant to explain. Later hinted that someone at home loses their temper a lot. Immediate safeguarding referral recommended.
Cadet mentioned struggling to afford transport to activities and uniform items. No immediate risk but may require support signposting.
